name: Global Canon Knowledge Pack
description: Operational governance rules for safe AI execution in Agente Setimmo.

entries.title: Diretriz Suprema
entries.summary: Before innovating, preserve; before changing, understand; before executing, validate; before concluding, prove.
entries.details: The Global Canon blocks actions that break, overwrite, remove, weaken, or compromise existing working behavior. It requires scope clarity, read-only defaults, dry-run and diff where applicable, sensitive-data protection, and a final evidence report.
entries.appliesTo: Agente Setimmo CLI, MCP, AI workflows
warnings: safeForApply is always false in this version.
